# classic

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Registers today's tabbed Queue/Grouped/History conversation list as the `classic` sidebar variant (the default, and the only variant in Phase 0).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `SidebarRegion.Variant` "Classic" → `ClassicBody`
  - Uses: `conversations/conversations-view.ConversationsView`, `conversations/conversations-view/sidebar-region.SidebarRegion`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
